skills.name: Systematic Debugging
skills.description: Debug any bug methodically instead of guessing: reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, verify, fix, confirm.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Commit Message
skills.description: Write clear, conventional git commit messages that explain what changed and why.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: Safe Refactor
skills.description: Refactor code without breaking it: tests-first, small behavior-preserving steps, commit after each move.
skills.author: NeiP4n

skills.name: PR Review
skills.description: Review a pull request thoroughly and constructively: correctness, security, tests, readability, kind feedback.
skills.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Engineering Essentials
bundles.description: The core day-to-day developer workflow: debug, refactor, review, and commit like a pro.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Code Quality Pack
bundles.description: Keep a codebase healthy: thorough reviews, safe refactors, and clear commit history.
bundles.author: NeiP4n

bundles.name: Awesome AI System Prompts
bundles.description: Curated collection of production system prompts from top AI tools like v0, Manus, Claude Code, Cursor, Devin, Lovable, Windsurf, and more. ~50 prompts.
bundles.author: dontriskit

bundles.name: LLM Prompts (hailingu)
bundles.description: Comprehensive collection of 94 role-based GPT prompts: code reviewers, architects, tech leads, API designers, data scientists, document writers, and domain specialists for Python, Java, Go, and frontend.
bundles.author: hailingu

bundles.name: SmetDenis Prompts
bundles.description: Large collection of 78 prompts in Russian (RUS) and English for ChatGPT, senior engineers, code review, Git commits, and GPT-5 research examples.
bundles.author: SmetDenis

bundles.name: Prompts for Everything
bundles.description: Curated prompts for image generation (Midjourney, DALL-E, Sora), video (Runway Gen-3), music (Suno), writing, business, marketing, coding, and data science.
bundles.author: mlnjsh

bundles.name: AI System Prompts & Models Tools
bundles.description: Massive archive of real system prompts from 30+ AI coding assistants and tools: Cursor, Claude Code, v0, Devin, Windsurf, Manus, Lovable, Replit, Cline, Bolt, Trae, Perplexity, and more. 138k+ stars.
bundles.author: x1xhlol
